title: Hiring Design Foundations
shortSummary: Build stronger hiring design foundations judgment so leadership / people work becomes clearer, more repeatable, and easier to lead.
whyItMatters: Hiring Design Foundations is a leverage point inside leadership / people. It supports the broader goal of hiring, delegation, culture, management, and communication.
coreConcepts: Hiring Design Foundations needs clear definitions before it can become a reliable operating system.
Good hiring design foundations work depends on better signal, better sequencing, and cleaner ownership.
Hiring Design Foundations should reduce rework and improve the quality of decisions across the business.
